variants: Veronica Samuel has made significant strides in the field of Cognitive Robotics, largely thanks to her mentor, Paulo Murta, who provided profound guidance during her academic development. In addition to her research, Veronica holds a professional license known as the Dragonship Captaincy Writ, which highlights her diverse capabilities. She is also a dedicated member of the Dragonfly Candlemakers Guild, where she engages with her passion for candlemaking. Her innovative projects in robotics have been supported by funding from Verdant Canopy Grants, furthering her endeavors in this cutting-edge field.
